title: Upcoming Wow experience hackathon!
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Tomorrow the WoW hackathon begins; monday developers from all over the world are coming together for a day dedicated to implementing your suggestions, many from our feature request category!

But that’s not all! Our community will be able to tune in LIVE throughout the day and join in on the hackathon by following our real-time community progress report, which will be live in our facebook group. Join us and follow the progress live!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Too bad I can’t watch live because I’m unwilling to hand over my data to Facebook. Why pick such a privacy invading platform for this?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: We will also be sharing updates here so stay tuned!
